refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall derive performance requirements from worksite mission context, record these requirements with traceability, and manage updates including baselines and calibration history.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing into derivation, recording, and management clarifies distinct functional concerns and supports traceability and history maintenance as required by constraints.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify by demonstrating documented performance targets traceable to worksite inputs and a maintained history of baseline and calibration updates.
sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

candidate_dps: Algorithmic derivation engine using worksite data inputs
Structured performance requirements database with versioning
Update management process with baseline and calibration tracking
selected_dp.selected_dp: Algorithmic derivation engine using worksite data inputs; Structured performance requirements database with versioning; Update management process with baseline and calibration tracking

potential_sources: Data flow between derivation engine and database
Update management interacting with database and derivation engine
coupling_check.notes: DPs are logically coupled but modular; clear interfaces and data ownership minimize coupling risks.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability and accuracy of worksite mission context data
Risk of data inconsistency if update management is not synchronized
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions and synchronization mechanisms between DP components to mitigate coupling risks.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Centralized module responsible for performance requirement derivation, recording, and management

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives worksite mission context data for derivation

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Outputs derived performance requirements to other system components

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports updates and synchronization of performance requirements data

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as core logic and data management reside here; low diffusion risk.
Vehicle module has limited role; would cause high diffusion if assigned here.
Not relevant for performance requirement management; high diffusion risk.
Safety Services focus elsewhere; poor containment and high diffusion risk.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the performance requirement derivation and management in NGHE Solution module minimizes diffusion and supports traceability and history maintenance.
containment_risks: Potential complexity concentration in NGHE Solution module
Dependency on accurate and timely telemetry data input
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor complexity growth in NGHE Solution; consider sub-modularization if needed.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Functional requirements are clearly refined and mapped to logically distinct design parameters with manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk due to centralized containment in NGHE Solution module
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores strongly favor NGHE Solution module, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via documented traceability and history records within NGHE Solution module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of all sub-FRs to a single implementation module with well-defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define detailed interface contracts for Telemetry and Network Link inputs/outputs.
Plan for complexity management within NGHE Solution module.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, refinement of interface contracts and complexity management strategies are needed before proceeding.
next_level_sub_frs: Derive performance requirements from worksite mission context
Record derived performance requirements with traceability
Manage updates to performance requirements including baselines and calibration history

revise.why: To specify detailed interface contracts and plan for complexity management within the NGHE Solution module.

assumptions: Worksite mission context data is accurate and timely.
NGHE Solution module can handle complexity of combined DP logic.
open_risks: Potential data inconsistency if update management is not synchronized.
Complexity concentration in NGHE Solution module.
evidence_needed: Interface specifications for Telemetry, Tasking, and Network Link.
Complexity analysis or modularization plan for NGHE Solution.
